assertions.title: Testnet network configuration
assertions.reason: wallet-provider.tsx sets ACTIVE_NETWORK to Network.TESTNET and uses it for wallet provider and derived wallet setup.

steps.action: Run rg for ACTIVE_NETWORK and Network.TESTNET in wallet-provider.tsx
steps.observed: Found const ACTIVE_NETWORK = Network.TESTNET and provider uses ACTIVE_NETWORK

assertions.title: SDK uses testnet contract
assertions.reason: web/lib/sdk.ts imports CONTRACT_ADDRESS from config.ts and builds payloads with that variable; web/.env.local sets testnet contract address and NEXT_PUBLIC_APTOS_NETWORK=testnet.

steps.action: Run rg in web/lib/sdk.ts for CONTRACT_ADDRESS/config usage
steps.observed: CONTRACT_ADDRESS is assigned from ENV_CONTRACT_ADDRESS imported from @/lib/config

steps.action: Run rg in web/.env.local for NEXT_PUBLIC_APTOS_NETWORK and NEXT_PUBLIC_CONTRACT_ADDRESS
steps.observed: NEXT_PUBLIC_APTOS_NETWORK=testnet and NEXT_PUBLIC_CONTRACT_ADDRESS set to deployed testnet address

assertions.title: Deep ask-side liquidity
assertions.reason: API depth response shows ask-side notional > $5,000 (observed ~202,100 USD1) with many levels.

steps.action: Fetch GET /depth with retry/backoff and save successful 200 JSON
steps.expected: Populated asks suitable for deep liquidity validation
steps.observed: Asks populated with 21 levels and large quantities

steps.action: Compute ask notional from depth JSON

evidence.network: GET /depth -> intermittent 429/200; 200 responses returned populated asks

assertions.title: Deep bid-side liquidity
assertions.reason: API depth response shows bid-side notional > $5,000 (observed ~197,900 USD1) across multiple levels.

steps.action: Compute bid notional from depth JSON

assertions.title: Realistic spread
assertions.reason: Best bid/ask from API depth are not within 0.5%; observed best_bid=0.09990000 and best_ask=0.00010100 (spread_percent=-99.898899).

steps.action: Fetch GET /depth and derive best bid/ask
steps.observed: Depth includes a very low ask level at 0.000101

evidence.network: GET /depth -> 200 responses repeatedly include anomalous best ask

assertions.issues: API /depth reports an anomalous ask level that makes spread unrealistic.

assertions.title: Multiple price levels
assertions.reason: Depth response shows at least 10 levels per side (observed 20 bid levels and 21 ask levels).

assertions.title: Demo wallet funded
assertions.reason: setup-demo-wallet script cannot complete because available deployer key is unauthorized for test_cash::mint_test_cash, and local Aptos config does not include cash-testnet profile required by script fallback.

steps.expected: Script loads deployer key and completes setup
steps.observed: Failed: no deployer private key available / missing cash-testnet profile

steps.action: Retry setup-demo-wallet with default profile key exported as APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY
steps.expected: Script funds, mints, deposits, and prints wallet details
steps.observed: Step 3 mint TestCASH aborts with E_UNAUTHORIZED and script exits

evidence.network: Script submitted initial testnet txs (APT transfer, USD1 mint) but failed before completion

assertions.issues: Required authorized deployer credentials for TestCASH minting were not available in this isolation context.

assertions.title: USD1 deposited into orderbook
assertions.reason: Same blocker as VAL-SETUP-001; script exits at Step 3 before reaching Step 4 USD1 deposit.

steps.observed: Script aborts during TestCASH mint with E_UNAUTHORIZED before deposit step

evidence.network: No deposit confirmation emitted due earlier abort

assertions.issues: Unable to reach deposit step because deployer authorization prerequisite failed.

assertions.title: API serves testnet depth
assertions.reason: GET /depth returns populated bids/asks arrays with deep liquidity from testnet data.

evidence.network: GET /depth -> intermittent 429, recovered to 200 with populated data

assertions.title: $1000 buy simulation fills
assertions.reason: buy-simulation succeeded on testnet with verified fill and reported slippage 0.1000% (<5%).

steps.action: Run buy-simulation with testnet contract and exported APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY
steps.expected: Script executes market buy and verifies fill
steps.observed: Transaction succeeded and fill verified via trade events

frictions.description: Local API /depth intermittently returned HTTP 429 RATE_LIMITED during validation.
frictions.resolution: Applied 5-second backoff retries and used successful 200 responses for assertions.

frictions.description: Mission guidance expects .aptos/config.yaml cash-testnet profile, but local config only had default profile.
frictions.resolution: Exported default profile key for retries; this allowed buy-simulation but not admin-only setup-demo-wallet completion.

frictions.description: Testnet faucet programmatic minting was unavailable.
frictions.resolution: Used deployer APT transfer fallback where scripts support it.

blockers.description: setup-demo-wallet requires authorized TestCASH deployer key; available key failed with test_cash::mint_test_cash E_UNAUTHORIZED and no cash-testnet profile was present for fallback.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried script with exported default-profile APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY and confirmed profile metadata; script still failed before deposit step.

summary: Tested 10 assigned curl/script assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed (VAL-SEED-003 unrealistic spread from /depth best ask anomaly), and 2 blocked (VAL-SETUP-001/002 due missing authorized deployer credentials for setup-demo-wallet).
